title: Roleplay Armor
body:
This Mod was made for a Minecraft based medivel Roleplay.

 

The Armor is Unbreakable and doesn´t have recipes yet. 


The Armor have different Protection level, the most have the same as Leather Armor, some the Protection as Chain Armor (for example Guard Armor) and a few the same a Iron (Knight Armor). At the Moment there is no Armor with the Same Protection as Diamend.
You can open and close some Helmet with a Keybind ( O by Default), if there is a "(open)" and "(closed)" Version you can switch between them with the Keybind.


Known issues:
Armor size not working with More Player Models (can´t be fixed)



Soon:
- More Armor
- Maybe new feature 


Do you have any ideas or proposals for future Armor or have bigger or smaller Question? Just write it in the Comments, send me a message or join my Discord Server and i will see if i could help you or add it.

When join you can send me your feedback better or send me exampels of your wishes and help me make a this mod better. 



 

 1.12.2 and 1.16.5 will no longer receive updates

 

 

You can use this Mod in your Modpack, just notice this Page.

 

This Mod was created using MCreator
